title: Biomimethics in Biomedicine: Integrating Ethical Frameworks for Sustainable Drug Development
description: This article examines the critical intersection of bioethics and biomimicry for researchers, scientists, and drug development professionals. It explores the foundational ethical principles of learning from nature, outlines methodological frameworks for application, addresses challenges in implementing biomimetic strategies, and validates the approach through comparative analysis with conventional methods.
audience: researchers, scientists, and drug development professionals
